mapper.select: SELECT W.WORKORDNO AS WORKORDNO, W.WORKORDNO AS PAR_WORKORDNO, W.PARTNO, W.ORDQTY, W.ORDDATE, W.ORDSTATE, G.PARTNM, G.STANDARD, G.UNIT, P.PROCESSNM, L.LINENM FROM TBL_PROD_WORKORDER W LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_GOODS G ON W.PARTNO = G.PARTNO LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_PROCESS P ON W.PROCESSCD = P.PROCESSCD LEFT JOIN TBL_COM_LINE L ON W.LINECD = L.LINECD WHERE W.PAR_WORKORDNO = #{PAR_WORKORDNO} AND W.USEYN = 1 ORDER BY W.WORKORDNO ASC

SELECT 'WO' + FORMAT(GETDATE(), 'yyyyMMdd') + '-' + FORMAT(ISNULL(MAX(CAST(RIGHT(WORKORDNO, 3) AS INT)), 0) + 1, '000') AS NEXTNUM FROM TBL_PROD_WORKORDER WHERE WORKORDNO LIKE 'WO' + FORMAT(GETDATE(), 'yyyyMMdd') + '%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_PROD_WORKORDER ( WORKORDNO, PAR_WORKORDNO, PLANTCD, PROCESSCD, SHIFT, PARTNO, ORDQTY, ORDTYPE, ORDpriority, ORDDATE, ORDSTATE, LINECD, USEYN, REGUSERID, REGDTM, EDITUSERID, EDITDTM, REMARK ) VALUES ( #{WORKORDNO}, #{PAR_WORKORDNO}, #{PLANTCD}, #{PROCESSCD}, #{SHIFT}, #{PARTNO}, #{ORDQTY}, #{ORDTYPE}, #{ORDpriority}, #{ORDDATE}, #{ORDSTATE}, #{LINECD}, 1, #{REGUSERID}, GETDATE(), #{EDITUSERID}, GETDATE(), #{REMARK} )
